name: MFA Request Generation (MFA Fatigue)
description: Detects excessive MFA push notifications indicative of MFA fatigue attack
query:
// Detect MFA fatigue attack
// Trigger on multiple MFA requests for same user in short time
events from authentication
where event_type = "mfa_challenge"
  and status = "failure"
group by username
having count(*) > 8
within 300 seconds
